how worth is the golden rose shop?
If you have spare golden roses go ahead
You'll probably be starving for it upgrading skills and stuff though
i mean is it worth farming golden roses to buy mats from shop instead of farming mats directly

Hmm conversion is probably not worth it you'd probably get more farming them directly from the stages so it's just a matter of stamina it's not as if upgrading your units is super urgent anyways since there's always a difficulty you can do in the events for whatever level you are at
actually the prio for levelling is level - skills - talent (?)
Well makes sense since skills are super expensive
Perhaps it would depend on the character since some character's skill upgrades increase the scaling on your stats by good amount
But yeah just focus on using stamina for farming the materials directly whether or not you prioritize leveling or skills your golden roses will be starving later
No rush for you to catch up since again there's easier difficulties if you can't level up enough yet

Generally you should be farming event stages instead since they're more efficient. But for your question specifically, it seems like there's probably no difference in efficiency between farming mats directly and farming gold to buy mats

Level up skills to 1-3-3-3-3-3 won't cost much
3-5-5-5-5-5 cost purple material
6-6-6-6-6-6 cost 8 orange stone
At least, the lvl 45 elixir interlude and gold rose interlude work out to exactly the same amount of exp gained per menophin

For we endgame players, we just wait for more stones...
Leveling up the talent is unneccessary unless your team suffers at the first battle
Kinda nice for stages where you just go straight into the boss with no small fights beforehand, but yeah I'd rather level up a new character with those mats <:nomoney:1243502188471517235>

im new to the game. how important is team and character planning in this game? or how generous is the game to let us pull for waifus while also pulling meta charas. i wanna know if it's okay to muck up my beginner pulls or if i have to check a guide (if there are) 😂

every character has a value (except doll, sorry doll) and until like lvl 50 the resources are cheap so u won't waste any ... and gacha? the standard banner pulls ... u will be hoarded in those, in a week I did over 300 pulls there

play what u like, what looks good, what u enjoy, worry about what is useful after ch 4 or so, and standard value Blue>Yellow>Red>Purple when it comes to how many characters are good from each, oh and get hamel (the music guy)
There are some really strong supports like the current featured Hameln who will make almost any team better, but on the whole building characters doesn't seem to be too punishing
Me use use her in everyday dream dive<:stoppage:1236938521365839872>
